name: awesome-llm-apps
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Shubhamsaboo /

      awesome-llm-apps  

    
      100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
summary: 该项目收集了100多个可直接运行的AI智能体与RAG应用实例，开发者能快速克隆并定制化部署，为构建大语言模型应用提供丰富参考。

name: hallmark
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Nutlope /

      hallmark  

    
      Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
summary: Hallmark 是一个为 AI 编程工具设计的反 AI 垃圾风格 CSS 框架，值得关注因为它能帮助开发者提升 AI 生成代码的视觉质量。

name: penpot
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        penpot /

      penpot  

    
      Penpot: The open-source design platform for Product teams that need scalable collaboration.
summary: Penpot 是一款面向产品团队的开源设计平台，支持大规模协作，值得关注因为它打破了传统设计工具封闭生态，提供免费且可自托管的协作解决方案。

name: sharpemu
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        par274 /

      sharpemu  

    
      An experimental PlayStation 5 emulator project.
summary: Sharpemu是一个实验性的PlayStation 5模拟器项目，值得关注因为它尝试实现对最新游戏主机的模拟。

name: graphify
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Graphify-Labs /

      graphify  

    
      AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
summary: 该项目能将代码、文档、数据库等各类文件转换为可查询的知识图谱，让开发人员通过统一视图管理整个技术栈。

name: HenryNdubuaku
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        HenryNdubuaku /

      maths-cs-ai-compendium  

    
      Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer
summary: 该项目系统整理了数学、计算机科学和人工智能的核心知识，旨在帮助开发者成为优秀的AI/ML研究工程师，其全面的学习路径和实战资源值得关注。

name: Dicklesworthstone
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Dicklesworthstone /

      destructive_command_guard  

    
      The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
summary: 该项目是用Rust开发的破坏性命令防护工具，能阻止代理执行危险的git和shell命令，值得关注因为它能有效防止自动化操作导致的数据丢失。

name: OpenCut-app
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        OpenCut-app /

      OpenCut  

    
      The open-source CapCut alternative
summary: OpenCut 是一款开源的 CapCut 替代视频剪辑工具，值得关注因为它提供了免费、可定制且功能强大的视频编辑解决方案。
